Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to occur after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is performed in variants that include a re-submission loop
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be followed by a new submission, compared to the average time between initial submission and final approval in successful cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING across all variants containing this rejection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases where no further submission occurs, versus time in cases that eventually lead to Payment Handled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Average waiting time to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that end with this activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING measured from the immediately preceding Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and Request Payment in rework paths that eventually reach payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case
